basics.name: Scott Xu
basics.label: Senior Project Manager & AI Product Builder
basics.summary: Singapore-based Product Manager with 15+ years in banking and financial-services transformation, now leading AI-powered client onboarding at a global bank as journey lead for a Flowable-based agentic workflow platform. Ships his own products: Turtle Soup (a bilingual AI puzzle game on the iOS App Store) and MyHub (a personal data platform). NUS MBA, Tongji University B.Sc. Computer Science, PMP certified. Open to AI/Product opportunities.

work.name: UBS
work.position: Product Manager & Journey Lead — AI-Powered Client Onboarding
highlights: Own end-to-end design and delivery of a Flowable-based workflow orchestration platform that integrates AI agents (source-of-wealth analysis, name screening) into a unified onboarding journey; scope spans all onboarding journeys bank-wide; in active build toward launch.
Built internal AI agents with Microsoft Copilot (BRD drafting, compliance checks) adopted by 99+ internal users.

work.name: UBS
work.position: Senior Project Manager & Migration Stream Lead
highlights: Strategic Migration Lead on the UBS/CS integration (short assignment in Zürich): turned around a distressed Client Static Data stream, delivering 4 consecutive successful migration waves.
Ran SQL analyses to resolve data fallouts and re-engineered a reconciliation process, cutting time by 30%.

As APAC Migration Stream Lead & COO PM, migrated 25,000+ Wealth Management clients within a 3-month window; wrote Python automation for data cleansing and validation; led Compliance & Risk system optimization for the COO office.

work.name: Infosys Consulting
highlights: Ran the PMO for a $6M+ investment platform transformation (150+ resources, 100+ deliverables) and led 17 offshore resources.
Lifted data-comparison efficiency by 75% via self-built tools.
Designed 6 investment trading workflows (Equity, Bonds, FX, ETD, Funds).

work.name: Infosys
highlights: Delivered 10+ banking system upgrades, including a short on-site "Floor Runner" stint in Zürich.
Localized onboarding workflows (KYC / ALM / account opening).
Raised test automation effectiveness by 90% — earned a CEO Award.

projects.name: Turtle Soup (海龟汤)
projects.description: AI-powered bilingual lateral-thinking puzzle game, live on the iOS App Store.

projects.name: MyHub
projects.description: Personal data platform: plugin-based parsers feeding interactive dashboards. In production for personal use.
